summary: This repository implements **TTRL (Test-Time Reinforcement Learning)**, a novel approach for training Large Language Models using reinforcement learning on test data without ground-truth labels. The key innovation is using majority voting (maj@n) from multiple model generations as pseudo-rewards during test-time adaptation. Built on the verl framework, it applies PPO/GRPO reinforcement learning to improve model performance on verifiable tasks like mathematics and coding. The codebase demonstrates significant improvements (211% on AIME 2024 with Qwen-2.5-Math-7B) and supports distributed training across hundreds of GPUs with models up to 671B parameters. The framework is production-ready, used by ByteDance for training Doubao models, and supports multiple backends (FSDP, Megatron-LM) and inference engines (vLLM, SGLang).
key_files:
verl/verl/trainer/main_ppo.py - Main training entry point that orchestrates Ray initialization, worker setup, and distributed training configuration
verl/examples/ttrl/Qwen2.5/aime.sh - Example training script demonstrating hyperparameter configuration and TTRL usage on AIME 2024 dataset
verl/verl/trainer/ppo/ttrl_utils.py - Core TTRL implementation with majority voting logic, rollout selection, and pseudo-ground-truth generation
verl/verl/utils/reward_score/ttrl_math/__init__.py - Main reward function that extracts and grades math answers against majority-voted ground truth
verl/verl/utils/reward_score/ttrl_math/grader.py - Mathematical equivalence checker supporting LaTeX, numerical, and symbolic expression comparison
verl/verl/trainer/ppo/ray_trainer.py - Main RayPPOTrainer class integrating TTRL into the training loop with distributed orchestration
verl/verl/protocol.py - DataProto class defining the core data structure and transfer protocol between distributed workers
verl/verl/trainer/ppo/core_algos.py - PPO algorithm implementations including advantage estimators (GAE, GRPO, REINFORCE++) and policy loss functions
verl/verl/trainer/config/ppo_trainer_ttrl.yaml - TTRL-specific configuration file enabling test-time RL with appropriate hyperparameters
verl/data/preprocess.py - Data preprocessing script converting JSON datasets to Parquet format for the verl framework
